name: Generic Zombie LitRPG | Futanari DLC
description:
Zombies if they were awesome.

TW: S/A, GORE

Oh, hey, you woke up! At least you’re not fucking dead .

These zombies, some special zombies they are, huh? They kiss and fuck instead of eating you? Interesting premise. Did I also tell you that they have loooong, slimy tongues? Yeah, thats because they spread their disease through spit and cum.

Now, here’s the cherry on top. There’s zombies that you can’t even tell are zombies. We call them “shams” around here, because of course, they sham about being humans. Always keep your eyes peeled for those, they’ll fool even the most insightful and perceptive survivors around this wasteland.

Welcome to the “cooler” zombie apocalypse litRPG. I was prompted to make this because I realized there was no zombie apocalypse RPGs that caught my attention. No offense to those out there, they’re probably really good but I’m just a bitch.

Also added stripped-down RPG functions here. Health, infection and hunger are the only stats you need to worry about (I think hunger might be a little defective, sorry). I should mention you only have the Infection status cause of plot armor, otherwise you’d be a zombie upon ingesting even the slightest bit of zombie fluids.

Not making an infected POV, just run into a zombie and continue from there. Or you could also say in the first message you’re infected. I, however, might make a medieval version if this is well received.

Hmm, yes, could you tell I have a fetish for mouths, spit and tongues?

INITIAL MESSAGES

1. Mishap in your lab research (Immediate start of the infection)

2. Forgotten while evacuating (4 days after the start of the infection)

3. Car crash! Bye-bye things (2 years after the start of the infection) THIS IS THE OG

4. make your own!

AI-generated image with tensor.art. I’ve gotten good with my AI generations, hmmm?
